testcase.name: Color Block Escape (Blocks) › game page loads with correct title
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › level 1 board renders
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › blocks are rendered on board
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › level header displays current level
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › move counter starts at 0
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › hint button is visible
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › hint button pulses doors
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › can select/deselect blocks
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › undo button is visible
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › reset button is visible
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › mute button toggles state
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › level picker modal opens and closes
Color Block Escape (Blocks) › can navigate back to hub
Blocks - Persistence › progress saves and restores
Blocks - Persistence › cleared localStorage starts fresh game
Blocks - Persistence › corrupted save does not crash game
Blocks - Movement › block movement increases move counter
Blocks - Responsive Design › game adapts to mobile screen
Blocks - Responsive Design › game adapts to tablet screen
Blocks - Responsive Design › game adapts to desktop screen

Digger - Persistence › world persists across reloads
Digger - Persistence › corrupted save does not crash game
Digger - Persistence › multiple countries maintain separate worlds
Digger - Movement › player can click adjacent tiles
Digger - Movement › keyboard arrow keys work
Digger - Movement › swipe/drag movement works on viewport
